Bash(git -C /Users/ronneeman/slb commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix collection pipeline bugs: Instagram parsing, media parallelism, enrichment trigger

- Fix flatten_instagram_top_serp dropping ~80% of posts by not parsing
  fill_items \(list values in layout_content were silently skipped\)
- Parallelize media downloads with ThreadPoolExecutor \(10 workers\) instead
  of sequential per-post loop, ~10x speedup for media-heavy collections
- Fix missing FirestoreClient import in collection_service._run_pipeline
  that silently prevented auto-enrichment for frontend-created collections
- Add missing thinkingEntries/suggestions fields in session-reconstructor
  to fix crash when restoring previous sessions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
